metadata.description: Lido is a liquid staking protocol that allows users to stake ETH and receive stETH, a rebasing liquid staking token representing their staked position. Governance operates through an Aragon-based DAO (LDO token voting) with a Dual Governance module that gives stETH holders veto power over DAO proposals via an EmergencyProtectedTimelock. The protocol manages $1.82B in capital, with oracle committees reporting validator balances and a guardian committee securing the deposit flow against front-running attacks. The Lido V3 (stVaults) upgrade adds a customizable staking layer where node operators and institutional users deploy individual StakingVaults coordinated by a central VaultHub, with per-vault Dashboards, an OperatorGrid for tiered collateralization, a PredepositGuarantee for validator security, and a LazyOracle that reconciles vault state via merkle proofs against the AccountingOracle. Key external dependency is the Ethereum Beacon Chain DepositContract.

admins.name: Lido DAO Agent
admins.description: The primary governance executor for the Lido DAO. Holds DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE on most protocol contracts and can upgrade proxies, manage staking modules, configure oracle parameters, and grant/revoke roles across the entire system. Controls $1.82B in direct capital exposure across 17 contracts. All actions flow through the Voting contract, which is gated by the DualGovernance module.

mitigations.label: basis points cap
mitigations.description: Fee and share limit parameters are capped at 10,000 basis points (100%). Fees cannot be set to extract more than 100% of rewards.

mitigations.label: basis points cap
mitigations.description: Fee and share limit parameters are capped at 10,000 basis points (100%). Fees cannot be set to extract more than 100% of rewards.

admins.name: Deposit Guardian EOA (0x5fd0...9F1)
admins.description: One of six Deposit Security Module guardians. Can pause deposits, authorize deposit transactions via quorum signatures, and unvet node operator signing keys.

admins.name: Deposit Guardian EOA (0x7912...AaF)
admins.description: One of six Deposit Security Module guardians. Can pause deposits, authorize deposit transactions via quorum signatures, and unvet node operator signing keys.

admins.name: Deposit Guardian EOA (0x6d22...389)
admins.description: One of six Deposit Security Module guardians. Can pause deposits, authorize deposit transactions via quorum signatures, and unvet node operator signing keys.

admins.name: Deposit Guardian EOA (0xf82D...d43)
admins.description: One of six Deposit Security Module guardians. Can pause deposits, authorize deposit transactions via quorum signatures, and unvet node operator signing keys.

admins.name: Deposit Guardian EOA (0xa56b...7d8)
admins.description: One of six Deposit Security Module guardians. Can pause deposits, authorize deposit transactions via quorum signatures, and unvet node operator signing keys.

admins.name: Lido DAO Voting
admins.description: Aragon Voting contract where LDO token holders create and vote on proposals. Can grant, revoke, and manage permissions on the ACL contract, controlling role assignments across the entire DAO infrastructure including the Agent, Finance, and TokenManager apps.

admins.name: Executor
admins.description: Immutable execution contract that forwards governance calls from the EmergencyProtectedTimelock to the Lido DAO Agent and DualGovernance configuration. Can configure governance parameters including submission delays, scheduling delays, and governance state transitions.

admins.name: Finance
admins.description: Aragon Finance app that can transfer tokens from the Lido DAO Agent treasury. Gated by ACL permissions managed through the DAO Voting contract.

admins.name: Oracle Committee Member (0x7318...d12)
admins.description: One of nine oracle committee members. Submits consensus reports to the AccountingOracle, ValidatorsExitBusOracle, and CSFeeOracle HashConsensus contracts. Quorum of these members is required to finalize oracle reports.

admins.name: Oracle Committee Member (0x4118...3F3)
admins.description: One of nine oracle committee members. Submits consensus reports to the AccountingOracle, ValidatorsExitBusOracle, and CSFeeOracle HashConsensus contracts.

admins.name: Oracle Committee Member (0x4043...eA2)
admins.description: One of nine oracle committee members. Submits consensus reports to the AccountingOracle, ValidatorsExitBusOracle, and CSFeeOracle HashConsensus contracts.

admins.name: Oracle Committee Member (0x007D...9b5)
admins.description: One of nine oracle committee members. Submits consensus reports to the AccountingOracle, ValidatorsExitBusOracle, and CSFeeOracle HashConsensus contracts.

admins.name: Oracle Committee Member (0xc79F...BAf)
admins.description: One of nine oracle committee members. Submits consensus reports to the AccountingOracle, ValidatorsExitBusOracle, and CSFeeOracle HashConsensus contracts.

admins.name: Oracle Committee Member (0x61c9...1c8)
admins.description: One of nine oracle committee members. Submits consensus reports to the AccountingOracle, ValidatorsExitBusOracle, and CSFeeOracle HashConsensus contracts.

admins.name: Oracle Committee Member (0xe57B...5c9)
admins.description: One of nine oracle committee members. Submits consensus reports to the AccountingOracle, ValidatorsExitBusOracle, and CSFeeOracle HashConsensus contracts.

admins.name: stETH Token Contract
admins.description: The Lido stETH token itself, which has permissioned functions to request share burns, commit shares to burn, and receive reward and withdrawal reports. These functions are called by other protocol contracts (Burner, AccountingOracle) as part of normal operations.

admins.name: TriggerableWithdrawalsGateway
admins.description: Immutable contract that can add withdrawal requests and trigger validator exits on the StakingRouter. Part of the validator exit mechanism.

admins.name: ResealManager
admins.description: Immutable contract that can pause and resume CSAccounting. Acts as a mechanism to reseal protocol components without requiring full governance action.

admins.name: GateSeal
admins.description: Immutable one-time-use contract that can pause CSAccounting for a predefined duration. Once triggered, it cannot be reused — a new GateSeal must be deployed by governance.

admins.name: Community Staking 4/6 Multisig
admins.description: 4-of-6 GnosisSafe multisig that can set bond curves on the CSAccounting contract, controlling the collateral requirements for Community Staking Module node operators.

admins.name: VettedGate
admins.description: Upgradeable contract that can set bond curves on CSAccounting, controlling collateral requirements for vetted community staking operators.

admins.name: TokenManager
admins.description: Aragon TokenManager app that manages the LDO governance token. Can mint and destroy LDO tokens, change the token controller, and enable/disable token transfers. Controls $689.19 in direct capital through the LDO token and Voting contract.

admins.name: EmergencyProtectedTimelock
admins.description: Timelock contract that gates all governance executions from DualGovernance. Executes proposals through the Executor contract after the required delay. Can transfer and renounce ownership of the Executor.

admins.name: DualGovernance
admins.description: Governance module that gives stETH holders veto power over DAO proposals. Submits proposals to and schedules execution on the EmergencyProtectedTimelock. Can cancel all non-executed proposals if the governance state enters a deadlock.

admins.name: Emergency Activation 4/7 Multisig
admins.description: 4-of-7 Safe multisig with the sole power to flip the EmergencyProtectedTimelock into emergency mode, but only before the on-chain protection end date (currently 2026-06-20). Activation alone does not execute or reset proposals — that power is held by the separate Emergency Execution 5/7 Multisig.

mitigations.label: protected period
mitigations.description: Emergency mode can only be activated before the on-chain emergency protection end date (currently 2026-06-20). Past that timestamp, this function reverts with EmergencyProtectionExpired and the activation committee permanently loses its power.

admins.name: Emergency Execution 5/7 Multisig
admins.description: 5-of-7 Safe multisig (same 7 signers as the Activation committee, higher quorum) that, once emergency mode is active, can call emergencyExecute to fast-track any pending proposal and emergencyReset to deactivate emergency mode while reassigning governance to the configured emergencyGovernance address. Powers expire once emergency protection ends (currently 2026-06-20).

mitigations.label: emergency mode gated
mitigations.description: Reverts unless the EmergencyProtectedTimelock is currently in emergency mode. Emergency mode can only be entered by the separate Emergency Activation 4/7 Multisig before the on-chain protection end date (currently 2026-06-20), and the resulting window lasts only 30 days. Outside that window the Execution Committee has no operative power.

mitigations.label: emergency mode gated
mitigations.description: Reverts unless the EmergencyProtectedTimelock is currently in emergency mode. Emergency mode can only be entered by the separate Emergency Activation 4/7 Multisig before the on-chain protection end date (currently 2026-06-20), and the resulting window lasts only 30 days. Outside that window the Execution Committee has no operative power.

admins.name: Accounting
admins.description: Upgradeable V3 Accounting contract that routes oracle reports into the stETH token contract and coordinates vault share accounting with VaultHub and LazyOracle. Proxy admin is the Lido DAO Agent; governance can upgrade the implementation.

admins.name: AccountingOracle
admins.description: Oracle contract that reports validator balances and staking rewards to the stETH token contract. Triggers handleOracleReport which rebases stETH, updates exited validator counts, and manages staking module reward distribution. Controls $8.47M in reachable capital.

admins.name: DepositSecurityModule
admins.description: Immutable module that gates ETH deposits to the Beacon Chain DepositContract. Requires a quorum of guardian signatures to authorize deposits, protecting against deposit front-running attacks. Can also decrease vetted signing keys on the StakingRouter. Controls $1.82B in reachable capital.

admins.name: ValidatorExitDelayVerifier
admins.description: Immutable verifier contract that can report validator exit delays to the StakingRouter, triggering penalties for staking modules whose operators fail to exit validators promptly.

admins.name: TiebreakerCoreCommittee
admins.description: Immutable committee contract that can break governance deadlocks by scheduling proposals and resuming sealed contracts through the DualGovernance module. Acts as a safety mechanism when governance enters an unresolvable state.

admins.name: Reseal Committee 5/6 Multisig
admins.description: 5-of-6 Safe multisig that can reseal sealable contracts through the DualGovernance module. This allows re-pausing protocol components that were previously sealed by the GateSeal mechanism.

admins.name: TiebreakerCoreCommittee (Secondary)
admins.description: Secondary TiebreakerCoreCommittee instance that can schedule proposals and resume sealable contracts. Part of the tiebreaker mechanism for resolving governance deadlocks.

admins.name: VaultHub
admins.description: Upgradeable central coordinator for all Lido V3 StakingVaults. Connects individual vaults to the core stETH accounting, enforces reserve ratios and force-rebalance thresholds, mints/burns stETH liabilities against vault collateral, and socializes bad debt. Lido DAO Agent holds DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE and the proxy admin role. PAUSE_ROLE is held by the Vaults GateSeal and ResealManager; VALIDATOR_EXIT_ROLE and BAD_DEBT_MASTER_ROLE are held by the VaultsAdapter (EasyTrack-gated).

admins.name: LidoExecutionLayerRewardsVault
admins.description: Immutable vault that collects execution layer rewards (MEV, priority fees) and forwards them to the stETH token contract via receiveELRewards. Controls $8.47M in direct capital.

admins.name: WithdrawalVault
admins.description: Upgradeable vault that receives withdrawals from the Beacon Chain and forwards them to the stETH token contract via receiveWithdrawals. Proxy admin is Lido DAO Agent. Controls $8.47M in direct capital.

dependencies.name: Ethereum Beacon Chain DepositContract
dependencies.description: The canonical Ethereum 2.0 deposit contract used by Lido to stake ETH with validators. The DepositSecurityModule and each Lido V3 StakingVault call deposit() to stake ETH; DepositSecurityModule also reads get_deposit_root() to verify deposit data integrity. This is an immutable Ethereum protocol contract — if it fails or is compromised, Lido cannot process new deposits.

funds.name: WithdrawalQueueERC721 (stETH)
funds.description: Withdrawal request queue where users lock stETH to receive ETH. Holds (N/A) in stETH and ETH balances, plus (N/A) in DeFi positions. Requests are fulfilled as the protocol processes validator exits and receives Beacon Chain withdrawals.

funds.name: Lido stETH Token (ETH Buffer)
funds.description: The stETH token contract itself holds (N/A) in ETH as a deposit buffer before it is staked on the Beacon Chain. This buffer provides immediate withdrawal liquidity for small requests.

funds.name: Lido DAO Token (LDO)
funds.description: The LDO governance token contract. Holds (N/A) in miscellaneous token balances.

audits.author: Sigma Prime
audits.scope: Easy Track smart contract security review

audits.author: Statemind
audits.scope: Dual Governance deployment & voting script review

audits.author: Statemind
audits.scope: Triggerable Withdrawals and CSM v2 audit

governance.votingProcess: 5d vote (3d main + 2d objection), then 3d+1d Dual Governance timelock. stETH holders can extend delay up to 45 days or trigger the rage quit stage.

codeAndAudits.title: Code & Audits
codeAndAudits.description: Smart contract analysis and audit history
